title: RITES Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Assistant Manager Posts
description: The Rail India Technical and Economic Services (RITES) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Assistant Manager Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can also apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma, B.E./B. Tech in Electrical, Electronics, and Mechanical Engineering can apply for the RITES Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the educatio...
